calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-11-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Hearing For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-08-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Guy Wilson, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff Edmond B. Mirabito, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by defendants Le Ngo, Tri Ngo, Sunny Ngo ind. and dba Qualitech Cleaners.
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages/Principal - $63,315.31
Prejudgment Interest - $0
Attorney's Fees - $7,000.00
Costs - $738.00
Total $71,053.31
Judgment was submitted and signed in open court.
